fields.title: Freeze Ralph behavior with regression tests
fields.description: Expand Ralph test coverage before refactoring so the migration preserves current fresh-session behavior. Cover state/task-file creation, resume flow, ralph_done finalize handshake, subagent blocking, completion marker handling, archive/clean/nuke, session ownership resolution, and command-only session actions.
fields.design: Keep the current ralph-fresh-session helper coverage and add focused test files for store/repo behavior, service/controller behavior, and adapter boundary behavior. Prefer @effect/vitest for Effect-native service tests while preserving any existing vitest integration tests needed for command wiring.
